title: APEX Agent Scorecard
description: Shape of a single per-agent scorecard emitted by tools/scripts/assess-agents.mjs (one file per agent under scorecards/<agent_id>.json). Captures the four-layer assessment: deterministic dimensions are scored by the harness; judgment dimensions (role_clarity, adversarial) are emitted as `pending` and resolved by tools/apex-prompts/utility-prompts/assess-agents.prompt.md.

agent_id.description: Agent file basename without the .agent.md suffix (e.g. 03-architect).

model.description: Raw frontmatter model value (array form on agents).

model_family.description: Normalized family from classifyModel (e.g. claude-opus, gpt-5.5, gpt-codex, mai-code, unknown).

step.description: Workflow step from the agent registry, or null for non-step agents.

invokable.description: Whether the agent is user-invocable (from the registry).

metrics.description: Deterministic mechanical metrics extracted from the agent definition.

dimensions.description: The eight scored dimensions across the four layers.

validator_status.description: Aggregate status from the validate-agents.mjs JSON enrichment subprocess.

blocker.description: True when any dimension carries a blocker severity (caps the composite).

mechanical_composite.description: 0-100 weighted score over the resolved deterministic buckets (renormalized); capped at 49 when blocker is true.

composite.description: Final composite once all buckets (including judgment) are resolved by the prompt; null while judgment_pending.

judgment_pending.description: True until the prompt resolves role_clarity and adversarial.

composite_buckets.description: Per-bucket 0-5 scores used to compute the composite (null when pending/na).

layer.description: Which assessment layer this dimension belongs to.

status.description: pending = awaiting prompt judgment; na = not applicable (e.g. no runtime profile).

score.description: 0-5 band score, or null when pending/na.

severity.description: Worst severity observed for this dimension.

evidence.description: Concrete, citeable observations supporting the score.
